title: Manage the most simple, yet powerful sales CRM with monday.com (Elevate 2022 takeaway)
excerpt:
As part of Elevate 2022, Account Executive Josh Benjamin explained some of the benefits of our incredible monday Sales CRM product and took us through a demo showing some of its key features.

posts.author: noy_s (Noy )
posts.cookedHtml:
As part of Elevate 2022, Account Executive Josh Benjamin explained some of the benefits of our incredible monday Sales CRM product and took us through a demo showing some of its key features.

In short, monday sales CRM is an end-to-end solution built on top of monday workOS with sales-specific functionality that is intuitive and user friendly, yet flexible enough so that it can be customized according to your own complex needs and use cases.

Josh describes one of its major benefits: it is super easy to adjust the CRM as your business evolves. With monday sales CRM, you can make quick, no-code or low-code changes to make impactful adjustments to your CRM so that it fits your own needs at all times.

Want to learn more about monday sales crm as well as the unique features that it provides? Check out our Knowledge Base articles all about it below!

  • Get started with monday sales CRM
  • Emails & Activities on monday.com
  • Quotes & Invoices on monday.com
  • monday WorkForms

To watch the full video, check out this link.

Do you have any other monday.com features that you to manage your sales workflows? We’d love to hear from you below!

posts.cookedHtml: You can also still watch Josh’s full session here. Check it out!
